title: thouinia pseudopunctata
intro: Thouinia pseudopunctata, also known as the Punctate Thouinia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae, native to the Caribbean and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thouinia pseudopunctata include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antipyretic. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used to make teas, tinctures, and ointments for topical application.
